scripts.build:contexts: npm run build:common-bounded-context && npm run build:user-management && npm run build:post-management
scripts.build:presentation: npm run build:presentation-common && npm run build:presentation-user && npm run build:presentation-post
scripts.build:applications: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build: npm run build:common && npm run build:contexts && npm run build:presentation && npm run build:applications
scripts.test:contexts: npm run test:user-management && npm run test:post-management
scripts.test:presentation: npm run test:presentation-common && npm run test:presentation-user && npm run test:presentation-post
scripts.test:applications: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:common && npm run test:contexts && npm run test:presentation && npm run test:applications
scripts.clean:contexts: npm run clean:user-management && npm run clean:post-management
scripts.clean:presentation: npm run clean:presentation-common && npm run clean:presentation-user && npm run clean:presentation-post
scripts.clean:applications: npm run clean:backend && npm run clean:frontend
scripts.clean: npm run clean:common && npm run clean:contexts && npm run clean:presentation && npm run clean:applications
scripts.reset:contexts: npm run reset:user-management && npm run reset:post-management
scripts.reset:presentation: npm run reset:presentation-common && npm run reset:presentation-user && npm run reset:presentation-post
scripts.reset:applications: npm run reset:backend && npm run reset:frontend
scripts.reset: npm run reset:common && npm run reset:contexts && npm run reset:presentation && npm run reset:applications
